untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cross-basket volatility matching (long basket volatility == short basket volatility) which cannot be expressed with single-instrument indicators. Volatility matching is a portfolio-level constraint that requires comparing atr_14 or hvol_20 across multiple instruments simultaneously. The allowed operators and indicator set do not support inter-basket comparison logic. Additionally, basket composition is marked AUTHOR_SILENT, making the rule incomplete.
translation_notes: Translated 52-week new highs/lows using Donchian Channel (dc_upper for 52-week equivalent highs, dc_lower for lows). However, the critical volatility-matching constraint cannot be operationalized in this single-instrument framework. A proper implementation would require portfolio-level logic comparing volatility metrics across the long and short baskets before entry.
